revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:二子塚古墳群]]
'''Futagozuka Kofun Group''' (二子塚古墳群)
* {{ill|Chiura Futagozuka Kofun Group|ja|千浦二子塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chiura Futagozuka Kofun Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504222|1=Chiura Futagozuka Kofun Group}} - Located in {{ill|Shika, Ishikawa|en|Shika, Ishikawa|qid=Q1349406|lt=Shika|1=Shika, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Hakui District, Ishikawa|en|Hakui District, Ishikawa|qid=Q1130953|lt=Hakui District|1=Hakui District, Ishikawa}}, {{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa Prefecture|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group|ja|上根二子塚古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamine Futagozuka Kofun Group|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Ichikai, Tochigi|en|Ichikai, Tochigi|qid=Q577654|lt=Ichikai|1=Ichikai, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Haga District, Tochigi|en|Haga District, Tochigi|qid=Q1192087|lt=Haga District|1=Haga District, Tochigi}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi Prefecture|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kasama)|ja|二子塚古墳群 (笠間市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kasama)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504224|1=Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kasama)}} - Located in {{ill|Kasama, Ibaraki|en|Kasama, Ibaraki|qid=Q845851|lt=Kasama|1=Kasama, Ibaraki}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki Prefecture|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kashima)|ja|二子塚古墳群 (鹿嶋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504225|1=Futagozuka Kofun Group (Kashima)}} - Located in {{ill|Kashima, Ibaraki|en|Kashima, Ibaraki|qid=Q467471|lt=Kashima|1=Kashima, Ibaraki}}, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group (Isehara)|ja|二子塚古墳群 (伊勢原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group (Isehara)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504227|1=Futagozuka Kofun Group (Isehara)}} - Located in {{ill|Isehara, Kanagawa|en|Isehara, Kanagawa|qid=Q734520|lt=Isehara|1=Isehara, Kanagawa}}, {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa Prefecture|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group (Iwata)|ja|二子塚古墳群 (磐田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group (Iwata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504230|1=Futagozuka Kofun Group (Iwata)}} - Located in {{ill|Iwata, Shizuoka|en|Iwata, Shizuoka|qid=Q386651|lt=Iwata|1=Iwata, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Futagozuka Kofun Group (Toyokawa)|ja|二子塚古墳群 (豊川市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futagozuka Kofun Group (Toyokawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504231|1=Futagozuka Kofun Group (Toyokawa)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|en|Toyokawa, Aichi|qid=Q389495|lt=Toyokawa|1=Toyokawa, Aichi}}, {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture|1=Aichi Prefecture}}.
